CX26aa1aec44e710e43aef66be241d485da4be28.code: contract DYXToken { string name = "DYNAX Token"; string symbol = "DYX"; uint256 totalSupply = 1000000; mapping balances; function init() { balances[caller] = totalSupply; } function balanceOf(account) { return balances[account]; } function transfer(to, amount) { if balances[caller] < amount { return {"status": "error"}; } balances[caller] = balances[caller] - amount; balances[to] = balances[to] + amount; return {"status": "success"}; } }
